The '''Cemas''' were a [[Species/Legends|species]] of [[Sentience/Legends|sentient]] beings that had [[Limb/Legends|feet]]. At least one member of the species had entered the [[galactic community]]<ref name="NR" /> by [[17 ABY/Legends|17 ABY]]. That [[Standard year/Legends|year]],<ref name="ERC">''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]'' dates the events of ''[[The New Rebellion]]'' to [[17 ABY/Legends|17 ABY]].</ref> the [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]] [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] helped a [[Unidentified Cemas|Cemas]] to its feet in the [[Crystal Jewel]] [[Casino/Legends|casino]], on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]], after a [[Bombing of the Senate Hall|bomb went off]] in the [[New Republic Senate/Legends|New Republic Senate]] [[Senate Hall|Hall]] nearby.<ref name="NR" />

==Behind the scenes==
The Cemas appear in the [[1996]] novel ''[[The New Rebellion]]'', which was written by [[Kristine Kathryn Rusch]].<ref name="NR" />

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Rebellion]]'' {{1st}}
*[[The New Rebellion (abridged audiobook)|''The New Rebellion'' abridged audiobook]]
